name: whatsapp-bible
description: A free WhatsApp Bible chatbot built with Node.js, Express, whatsapp-web.js, and SQLite.

scripts.check: node --check src/server.js && node --check src/bot.js && node --check src/config/database.js && node --check src/services/bibleService.js && node --check src/services/userService.js && node --check src/services/reminderService.js && node --check src/services/statsService.js && node --check src/handlers/messageHandler.js && node --check src/handlers/groupHandler.js && node --check src/commands/helpCommand.js && node --check src/commands/profileCommand.js && node --check src/commands/reminderCommand.js && node --check src/commands/planCommand.js && node --check src/commands/adminCommand.js && node --check src/utils/scriptureParser.js && node --check src/utils/dateUtils.js
